title: Lars Counts Hugs
synopsis: Little Lars counts hugs from his loving family members throughout the day, from one hug with Mama to five hugs at bedtime, learning numbers while feeling surrounded by warmth and love.

illustration.description: Lars, a cheerful toddler with light brown skin and curly dark hair, gets a gentle hug from his mama who has warm brown skin and long black hair in a braid. They're in a sunny yellow kitchen with soft morning light. Lars is giggling with his arms wrapped around mama's neck.
illustration.alt: Lars getting a morning hug from his mama in the kitchen

illustration.description: Lars receives hugs from both his papa (tall with olive skin and short beard) and his older sister Mila (with the same curly hair, wearing a purple shirt). They're in the living room with soft blue walls and a cozy couch. Everyone has big smiles and rosy cheeks.
illustration.alt: Lars getting hugs from papa and sister in the living room

illustration.description: Lars sits at a small table with Grandma (silver-haired with kind eyes and floral apron) and Grandpa (with dark skin, white mustache, and gentle smile). They're having snacks together, each giving Lars a side hug. The kitchen has warm orange tones and cookie crumbs on the table.
illustration.alt: Lars getting hugs from grandparents during snack time

illustration.description: In the backyard, Lars gets group hugs from his family plus his young cousin Emma (with red hair and freckles). They're standing on soft green grass with pastel flowers blooming nearby. Everyone is laughing and their arms create a circle of love around Lars in the center.
illustration.alt: Lars in the center of a family group hug in the garden

illustration.description: At bedtime, Lars sits on his soft bed with light blue sheets while family members take turns giving him goodnight hugs. His room has a warm lamp glowing, stuffed animals on shelves, and a crescent moon visible through the window. Lars looks drowsy but content.
illustration.alt: Lars receiving bedtime hugs from family in his cozy bedroom

illustration.description: Lars sleeps peacefully in his crib, surrounded by soft toys. Dream clouds above his head show tiny hearts and all his family members' smiling faces. The room is bathed in gentle moonlight with soft purple and blue tones creating a serene atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Lars sleeping peacefully with dreams of family love

illustration.description: A cheerful counting page showing Lars holding up his fingers next to illustrations of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 hugs from the story. Each number is large, colorful, and paired with simple drawings of hugging figures. The background has soft rainbow colors and smiling stars.
illustration.alt: Counting review page with Lars and numbers one through five

illustration.description: The next morning, Lars wakes up with arms stretched wide, ready for more hugs. Sunlight streams through his window, and his whole family peeks around his bedroom door with loving smiles, ready to start the counting game all over again.
illustration.alt: Lars waking up ready for another day of family hugs

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: How many hugs did Lars get from Mama?
questions.explanation: Lars got one hug from Mama in the kitchen!

questions.question: Who gave Lars three hugs?
questions.explanation: Grandma and Grandpa gave Lars hugs during snack time!

questions.question: Where did Lars get his bedtime hugs?
questions.explanation: Lars got five goodnight hugs in his cozy bedroom!
